/usr/bin/ar qc libPayloadSDK.a CMakeFiles/PayloadSDK.dir/payloadSdkInterface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PayloadSDK.dir/third-party/mavlink/src/autopilot_interface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PayloadSDK.dir/third-party/mavlink/src/mavlink_ftp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PayloadSDK.dir/third-party/mavlink/src/serial_port.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PayloadSDK.dir/third-party/mavlink/src/udp_port.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libPayloadSDK.a
